title: Testing the Waters
summary_full: Iran has threatened to start charging a toll for passage through the Strait of Hormuz. Even if it never happens, the idea could unsettle global shipping.
summary_public: Iran has threatened to start charging a toll for passage through the Strait of Hormuz. Even if it never happens, the idea could unsettle global shipping.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran has threatened to start charging a toll for passage through the Strait of Hormuz
